# Dear ImGui — place files here

This directory is intentionally empty. Download Dear ImGui v1.91.6
from https://github.com/ocornut/imgui/releases/tag/v1.91.6 and copy
the following files here:

- imconfig.h
- imgui.cpp
- imgui.h
- imgui_draw.cpp
- imgui_internal.h
- imgui_tables.cpp
- imgui_widgets.cpp
- imstb_rectpack.h
- imstb_textedit.h
- imstb_truetype.h

And the following files into the `backends/` subdirectory:

- backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp
- backends/imgui_impl_glfw.h
- backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp
- backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.h
- backends/imgui_impl_opengl3_loader.h

See ../../README.md and ../../BUILD_LINUX.md for full instructions.

Dear ImGui is MIT-licensed. See LICENSE.txt in the upstream repo.
